title: Part Feeding CalWiz Shift Calibration
description:
Part Feeding CalWiz Shift Calibration

Shift Calibration

Note:  The shift calibration is required when the Pick Region described in 2.3.5  Pick is set to A, B, C or D (anything other than Anywhere).

(1) Add one part, and then click the <Run> button.

(2) Click the <Yes> button.

This starts the calibration process.

(3) Click the <Next> button.
